title: Board Template with default Shareable Permissions
excerpt: I’d like when I have a template that I can make it to where when the board is created and put in a workspace, it will be shareable. Then it’s automatically done and able to be linked with the dashboard created. Currently…

posts.author: ENies (Emily Nies)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like when I have a template that I can make it to where when the board is created and put in a workspace, it will be shareable. Then it’s automatically done and able to be linked with the dashboard created. Currently there is no way to do this and the user of the template has to make 4 boards shareable so the dashboard will work.
